calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Continued To Jul-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Steven Kay appearing represented by Wallace Doolittle, Esq.
Defendant Shilpa Gogri not appearing.

This department did not receive any paper courty copies for Judge Tong's review prior to today's hearing.

This matter is continued to July 17, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel an oppertunity to provide the copies.
